  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: May 7, 2026

Introduction

Base URL: http://hasapchy.local

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

Вход: GET /sanctum/csrf-cookie (опционально), POST /api/user/login с cookies. Ответ: user, сессия в httpOnly cookie.

API: credentials: include, префикс api/* без проверки CSRF (защита SameSite).

Endpoints

Display Swagger API page.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/documentation" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/documentation"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/documentation

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Display Oauth2 callback pages.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/oauth2-callback" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/oauth2-callback"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/oauth2-callback

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Авторизация

Сессия

POST api/user/login

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/login" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"qkunze@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"consequatur\",
    \"company_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "qkunze@example.com",
    "password": "consequatur",
    "company_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 20
x-ratelimit-remaining: 19
vary: Origin
 

{
    "error": "Неверный логин или пароль"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/user/login

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

Поле value должно быть действительным электронным адресом. Example: qkunze@example.com

password   string     

Example: consequatur

company_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

POST api/user/refresh

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/refresh" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/refresh"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (400):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 20
x-ratelimit-remaining: 18
vary: Origin
 

{
    "error": "Refresh token is required"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/user/refresh

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Задачи

Список задач

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/tasks

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Получить задачу по ID

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/tasks/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the task. Example: consequatur

Создать задачу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"supervisor_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"executor_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"priority\": \"low\",
    \"complexity\": \"simple\",
    \"deadline\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:25\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "supervisor_id": "consequatur",
    "executor_id": "consequatur",
    "priority": "low",
    "complexity": "simple",
    "deadline": "2026-05-07T20:38:25"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/tasks

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

supervisor_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the users table. Example: consequatur

executor_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the users table. Example: consequatur

project_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the projects table.

status_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the task_statuses table.

priority   string  optional    

Example: low

Must be one of:
  • low
  • normal
  • high
complexity   string  optional    

Example: simple

Must be one of:
  • simple
  • normal
  • complex
deadline   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:25

files   object  optional    
comments   object  optional    
checklist   object  optional    

Обновить задачу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"priority\": \"normal\",
    \"complexity\": \"complex\",
    \"deadline\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:25\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "priority": "normal",
    "complexity": "complex",
    "deadline": "2026-05-07T20:38:25"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/tasks/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the task. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

title   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

supervisor_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

executor_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

project_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the projects table.

status_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the task_statuses table.

priority   string  optional    

Example: normal

Must be one of:
  • low
  • normal
  • high
complexity   string  optional    

Example: complex

Must be one of:
  • simple
  • normal
  • complex
deadline   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:25

files   object  optional    
comments   object  optional    
checklist   object  optional    

Удалить задачу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Загрузить файлы задачи

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur/files" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "files[]=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php48F3.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/tasks/consequatur/files"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('files[]', document.querySelector('input[name="files[]"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/tasks/{id}/files

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the task. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

files   file[]     

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 10240 Килобайт(а).

Request      

GET api/task-statuses

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Управление статусами

Создать статус задачи

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/task-statuses" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"color\": \"mqeopf\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/task-statuses"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "color": "mqeopf"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/task-statuses

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: consequatur

color   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 7. Example: mqeopf

requires authentication

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/task-statuses/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"color\": \"mqeopf\"
}"

);

};

};

Заказы

Список заказов

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "meta": {
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "total": 0
        }
    }
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/orders

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать заказ

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"project_id\": 17,
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"currency_id\": 17,
    \"category_id\": 17,
    \"discount\": 45,
    \"discount_type\": \"fixed\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"client_balance_id\": 17,
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"price\": 56,
            \"width\": 16,
            \"height\": 50
        }
    ],
    \"temp_products\": [
        {
            \"name\": \"pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii\",
            \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
            \"quantity\": 12,
            \"price\": 66,
            \"width\": 13,
            \"height\": 65
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "project_id": 17,
    "cash_id": 17,
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "currency_id": 17,
    "category_id": 17,
    "discount": 45,
    "discount_type": "fixed",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "client_balance_id": 17,
    "products": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "price": 56,
            "width": 16,
            "height": 50
        }
    ],
    "temp_products": [
        {
            "name": "pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii",
            "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
            "quantity": 12,
            "price": 66,
            "width": 13,
            "height": 65
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "message": "Заказ успешно создан"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "client_id": [
            "The client id field is required."
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/orders

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

project_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

cash_id   integer     

Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer     

Example: 17

currency_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table. Example: 17

category_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the categories table. Example: 17

discount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

discount_type   string  optional    

This field is required when discount is present. Example: fixed

Must be one of:
  • fixed
  • percent
description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

products   object[]  optional    
product_id   integer  optional    

This field is required when products is present. The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 45

price   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

width   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 16

height   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 50

temp_products   object[]  optional    
name   string  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

quantity   number  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 12

price   number  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 66

unit_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the units table.

width   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 13

height   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 65

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

Изменить заказ

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"project_id\": 17,
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"currency_id\": 17,
    \"category_id\": 17,
    \"discount\": 45,
    \"discount_type\": \"fixed\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"status_id\": 17,
    \"remove_temp_products\": [
        17
    ],
    \"client_balance_id\": 17,
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"id\": 17,
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"price\": 56,
            \"width\": 16,
            \"height\": 50
        }
    ],
    \"temp_products\": [
        {
            \"id\": 17,
            \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
            \"quantity\": 12,
            \"price\": 66,
            \"width\": 13,
            \"height\": 65
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "project_id": 17,
    "cash_id": 17,
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "currency_id": 17,
    "category_id": 17,
    "discount": 45,
    "discount_type": "fixed",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "status_id": 17,
    "remove_temp_products": [
        17
    ],
    "client_balance_id": 17,
    "products": [
        {
            "id": 17,
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "price": 56,
            "width": 16,
            "height": 50
        }
    ],
    "temp_products": [
        {
            "id": 17,
            "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
            "quantity": 12,
            "price": 66,
            "width": 13,
            "height": 65
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "message": "Заказ сохранён"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Заказ не найден"
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "client_id": [
            "The client id field is required."
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/orders/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the order. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

project_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

cash_id   integer     

Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer     

Example: 17

currency_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table. Example: 17

category_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table. Example: 17

discount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

discount_type   string  optional    

This field is required when discount is present. Example: fixed

Must be one of:
  • fixed
  • percent
date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

status_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the order_statuses table. Example: 17

products   object[]  optional    
id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the order_products table. Example: 17

product_id   integer  optional    

This field is required when products is present. The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 45

price   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

width   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 16

height   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 50

temp_products   object[]  optional    
id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the order_temp_products table. Example: 17

name   string  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

quantity   number  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 12

price   number  optional    

This field is required when temp_products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 66

unit_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the units table.

width   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 13

height   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 65

remove_temp_products   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the order_temp_products table.

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

Удалить заказ

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/orders/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Заказ успешно удалён"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Заказ не найден"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Управление статусами заказов

Создать статус заказа

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/order_statuses" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"category_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/order_statuses"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "category_id": "consequatur",
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

requires authentication

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/leaves" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \

    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"leave_type_id\": 17,
    \"user_id\": 17,
    \"comment\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date_from\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"date_to\": \"2107-06-06\"
}"

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/leaves"
);

};

    "date_to": "2107-06-06"
};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/leaves

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

leave_type_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the leave_types table. Example: 17

user_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table. Example: 17

comment   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

date_from   string     

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

date_to   string     

Поле value не является датой. Поле value должно быть датой после или равной date_from. Example: 2107-06-06

Обновить запись отпуска

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/leaves/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"leave_type_id\": 17,
    \"user_id\": 17,
    \"comment\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date_from\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"date_to\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\"
}"

);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",

};

    "user_id": 17,
    "comment": "consequatur",
    "date_from": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "date_to": "2026-05-07T20:38:24"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/company-holidays/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the company holiday. Example: consequatur

Создать праздник

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/company-holidays" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"company_id\": 17,
    \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-06-06\",
    \"is_recurring\": false,
    \"color\": \"qeopfu\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/company-holidays"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "company_id": 17,
    "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "end_date": "2107-06-06",
    "is_recurring": false,
    "color": "qeopfu"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/company-holidays

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

company_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the companies table. Example: 17

name   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

date   string     

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

end_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Поле value должно быть датой после или равной date. Example: 2107-06-06

is_recurring   boolean  optional    

Example: false

color   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 7. Example: qeopfu

Обновить праздник

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/company-holidays/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"company_id\": 17,
    \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"is_recurring\": true,
    \"color\": \"niihfq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/company-holidays/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "company_id": 17,
    "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "end_date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "is_recurring": true,
    "color": "niihfq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

parent_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the departments table.

head_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

deputy_head_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

users   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

GET api/products/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the product. Example: consequatur

Создать товар/услугу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/products" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "type=consequatur"\
    --form "name=mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa"\
    --form "description=Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur."\
    --form "sku=consequatur"\
    --form "barcode=consequatur"\
    --form "unit_id=consequatur"\
    --form "retail_price=45"\
    --form "wholesale_price=56"\
    --form "purchase_price=16"\
    --form "date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "image=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php43FE.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/products"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('type', 'consequatur');
body.append('name', 'mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa');
body.append('description', 'Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur.');
body.append('sku', 'consequatur');
body.append('barcode', 'consequatur');
body.append('unit_id', 'consequatur');
body.append('retail_price', '45');
body.append('wholesale_price', '56');
body.append('purchase_price', '16');
body.append('date', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/products

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string     

Example: consequatur

image   file  optional    

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 2048 Килобайт(а). Example: D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php43FE.tmp

name   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

description   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur.

sku   string     

Example: consequatur

barcode   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

category_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table.

categories   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table.

unit_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the units table. Example: consequatur

retail_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

wholesale_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

purchase_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 16

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

creator_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

Обновить товар/услугу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/products/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "type=17"\
    --form "name=mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa"\
    --form "description=Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur."\
    --form "sku=consequatur"\
    --form "barcode=consequatur"\
    --form "retail_price=45"\
    --form "wholesale_price=56"\
    --form "purchase_price=16"\
    --form "date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "image=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php440F.tmp"

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/products/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

body.append('type', '17');
body.append('name', 'mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa');
body.append('description', 'Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur.');

body.append('retail_price', '45');
body.append('wholesale_price', '56');
body.append('purchase_price', '16');

Headers

Authorization

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the product. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

type   integer  optional    

Example: 17

image   file  optional    

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 2048 Килобайт(а). Example: D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php440F.tmp

name   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

description   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: Molestias ipsam sit veniam sed fuga aspernatur.

sku   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

barcode   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

category_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table.

categories   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table.

unit_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the units table.

retail_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

wholesale_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

purchase_price   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 16

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

creator_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

Request      

GET api/clients/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the client. Example: consequatur

Создать клиента

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/clients" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"first_name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"is_conflict\": false,
    \"is_supplier\": true,
    \"last_name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"patronymic\": \"consequatur\",
    \"position\": \"consequatur\",
    \"client_type\": \"investor\",
    \"address\": \"consequatur\",
    \"phones\": [
        \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqamniihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxbajwbpilpmufinllwloauydlsmsjury\"
    ],
    \"emails\": [
        \"jmacejkovic@example.com\"
    ],
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"status\": false,
    \"discount\": 56,
    \"discount_type\": \"percent\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/clients"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "first_name": "consequatur",
    "is_conflict": false,
    "is_supplier": true,
    "last_name": "consequatur",
    "patronymic": "consequatur",
    "position": "consequatur",
    "client_type": "investor",
    "address": "consequatur",
    "phones": [
        "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqamniihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxbajwbpilpmufinllwloauydlsmsjury"
    ],
    "emails": [
        "jmacejkovic@example.com"
    ],
    "note": "consequatur",
    "status": false,
    "discount": 56,
    "discount_type": "percent"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/clients

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

first_name   string     

Example: consequatur

is_conflict   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_supplier   boolean  optional    

Example: true

last_name   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

patronymic   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

position   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

client_type   string     

Example: investor

Must be one of:
  • company
  • individual
  • employee
  • investor
employee_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

address   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

phones   string[]  optional    

Количество символов в поле value должно быть не менее 6.

emails   string[]  optional    

Поле value должно быть действительным электронным адресом.

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

status   boolean  optional    

Example: false

discount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

discount_type   string     

Example: percent

Must be one of:
  • fixed
  • percent

    \"patronymic\": \"consequatur\",

requires authentication

    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Комментарии

Получить таймлайн для сущности

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/comments/timeline" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"consequatur\",
    \"id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/comments/timeline"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "consequatur",
    "id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

requires authentication

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/comments/timeline/unread-counts" \

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"consequatur\",
    \"ids\": [

    ]
}"

);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "ids": [
        45
    ]
};

}).then(response => response.json());

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 1000. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

Обновить комментарий

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/comments/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"body\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "body": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

);

POST api/news

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

content   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 50000. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

Accept

id   string

Создать шаблон

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/message-templates" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"name\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"content\": \"consequatur\",
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/message-templates"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "name": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "content": "consequatur",
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/message-templates

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Must be one of:
  • birthday
  • holiday
name   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

content   string     

Example: consequatur

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

Обновить шаблон

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/message-templates/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"name\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"content\": \"consequatur\",
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/message-templates/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "name": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "content": "consequatur",
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Authorization

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Must be one of:
  • birthday
  • holiday

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

Example: consequatur

Example: false

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur/contracts" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"project_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"number\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"type\": 0,
    \"amount\": 46,
    \"cash_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"client_balance_id\": 17,
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"returned\": false,
    \"note\": \"consequatur\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur/contracts"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "project_id": "consequatur",
    "client_id": 17,
    "number": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "type": 0,
    "amount": 46,
    "cash_id": "consequatur",
    "client_balance_id": 17,
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "returned": false,
    "note": "consequatur"
};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/projects/{projectId}/contracts

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

projectId   string     

Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

project_id   string     

Example: consequatur

client_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the clients table. Example: 17

number   string  optional    

This field is required when type is 0. Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

type   integer     

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
amount   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 46

currency_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table.

cash_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the cash_registers table. Example: consequatur

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

date   string     

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

returned   boolean  optional    

Example: false

files   object  optional    
note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

Headers

Authorization

Example: application/json

id   string

The id of an existing record in the projects table. Example: 17

client_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the clients table. Example: 17

number   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

type   integer  optional    

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
amount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 46

currency_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table.

cash_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the cash_registers table.

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

Example: false

files   object  optional    
note   string  optional

Request      

GET api/user/current

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Обновить профиль текущего пользователя

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/profile" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "name=Иван"\
    --form "surname=Петров"\
    --form "email=ivan@example.com"\
    --form "birthday=1990-01-15"\
    --form "current_password=oldpass123"\
    --form "password=newpass456"\
    --form "photo=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php412C.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/user/profile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('name', 'Иван');
body.append('surname', 'Петров');
body.append('email', 'ivan@example.com');
body.append('birthday', '1990-01-15');
body.append('current_password', 'oldpass123');
body.append('password', 'newpass456');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "user": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Иван",
        "surname": "Петров",
        "email": "ivan@example.com",
        "birthday": "1990-01-15",
        "photo": null,
        "roles": [],
        "permissions": []
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/user/profile

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Имя. Example: Иван

surname   string  optional    

Фамилия. Example: Петров

email   string  optional    

Email. Example: ivan@example.com

birthday   string  optional    

Дата рождения (Y-m-d). Example: 1990-01-15

current_password   string  optional    

Текущий пароль (обязателен при смене пароля). Example: oldpass123

password   string  optional    

Новый пароль (min 6 символов). Example: newpass456

photo   file  optional    

Фото (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, max 2MB). Example: Example: D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php412C.tmp

GET api/users/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

URL Parameters

id   integer

Создать нового пользователя

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "name=vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"\
    --form "surname=amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt"\
    --form "email=andreanne00@example.org"\
    --form "phone=wbpilpmufinllwloa"\
    --form "password=z.KcLcDi`wmUB)z&~n"\
    --form "hire_date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "dismissal_date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "birthday=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "position=rbyickznkygloigmkwxph"\
    --form "is_active="\
    --form "is_admin=1"\
    --form "is_simple_user="\
    --form "simple_category_id=17"\
    --form "roles[]=consequatur"\
    --form "companies[]=17"\
    --form "departments[]=17"\
    --form "company_roles[][company_id]=17"\
    --form "company_roles[][role_ids][]=consequatur"\
    --form "photo=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php415C.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('name', 'vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq');
body.append('surname', 'amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt');
body.append('email', 'andreanne00@example.org');
body.append('phone', 'wbpilpmufinllwloa');
body.append('password', 'z.KcLcDi`wmUB)z&~n');
body.append('hire_date', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('dismissal_date', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('birthday', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('position', 'rbyickznkygloigmkwxph');
body.append('is_active', '');
body.append('is_admin', '1');
body.append('is_simple_user', '');
body.append('simple_category_id', '17');
body.append('roles[]', 'consequatur');
body.append('companies[]', '17');
body.append('departments[]', '17');
body.append('company_roles[][company_id]', '17');
body.append('company_roles[][role_ids][]', 'consequatur');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/users

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

surname   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

email   string     

Поле value должно быть действительным электронным адресом. Example: andreanne00@example.org

phone   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 20. Example: wbpilpmufinllwloa

password   string     

Количество символов в поле value должно быть не менее 6. Example: z.KcLcDiwmUB)z&~n`

hire_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

dismissal_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

birthday   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

position   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: rbyickznkygloigmkwxph

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_admin   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_simple_user   boolean  optional    

Example: false

simple_category_id   integer     

Example: 17

photo   file  optional    

Поле value должно быть изображением. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 2048 Килобайт(а). Example: D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php415C.tmp

roles   string[]  optional    

The name of an existing record in the roles table.

companies   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the companies table.

company_roles   object[]  optional    
company_id   integer  optional    

This field is required when company_roles is present. The id of an existing record in the companies table. Example: 17

role_ids   string[]  optional    

The name of an existing record in the roles table.

departments   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the departments table.

Обновить пользователя

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "name=vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"\
    --form "surname=amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt"\
    --form "email=andreanne00@example.org"\
    --form "phone=wbpilpmufinllwloa"\
    --form "password=z.KcLcDi`wmUB)z&~n"\
    --form "hire_date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "dismissal_date=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "birthday=2026-05-07T20:38:23"\
    --form "position=rbyickznkygloigmkwxph"\
    --form "is_active="\
    --form "is_admin=1"\
    --form "is_simple_user="\
    --form "simple_category_id=17"\
    --form "roles[]=consequatur"\
    --form "companies[]=17"\
    --form "departments[]=17"\
    --form "company_roles[][company_id]=17"\
    --form "company_roles[][role_ids][]=consequatur"\
    --form "photo=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php416D.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('name', 'vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq');
body.append('surname', 'amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt');
body.append('email', 'andreanne00@example.org');
body.append('phone', 'wbpilpmufinllwloa');
body.append('password', 'z.KcLcDi`wmUB)z&~n');
body.append('hire_date', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('dismissal_date', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('birthday', '2026-05-07T20:38:23');
body.append('position', 'rbyickznkygloigmkwxph');
body.append('is_active', '');
body.append('is_admin', '1');
body.append('is_simple_user', '');
body.append('simple_category_id', '17');
body.append('roles[]', 'consequatur');
body.append('companies[]', '17');
body.append('departments[]', '17');
body.append('company_roles[][company_id]', '17');
body.append('company_roles[][role_ids][]', 'consequatur');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/users/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the user. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

surname   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

email   string  optional    

Поле value должно быть действительным электронным адресом. Example: andreanne00@example.org

phone   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 20. Example: wbpilpmufinllwloa

password   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value должно быть не менее 6. Example: z.KcLcDiwmUB)z&~n`

hire_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

dismissal_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

birthday   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

position   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: rbyickznkygloigmkwxph

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_admin   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_simple_user   boolean  optional    

Example: false

simple_category_id   integer     

Example: 17

photo   file  optional    

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 2048 Килобайт(а). Example: D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php416D.tmp

roles   string[]  optional    

The name of an existing record in the roles table.

companies   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the companies table.

company_roles   object[]  optional    
company_id   integer  optional    

This field is required when company_roles is present. The id of an existing record in the companies table. Example: 17

role_ids   string[]  optional    

The name of an existing record in the roles table.

departments   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the departments table.

Удалить пользователя

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/users/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Создать роль

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/roles" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"permissions\": [
        \"consequatur\"
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/roles"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "permissions": [
        "consequatur"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Создать проект

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"client_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "client_id": "consequatur",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: consequatur

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

client_id   string     

Example: consequatur

users   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

Обновить проект

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"client_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "client_id": "consequatur",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/projects/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the project. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: consequatur

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

client_id   string     

Example: consequatur

users   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

description   string  optional    

Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

Загрузить файлы проекта

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur/upload-files" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "files[]=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php450A.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/projects/consequatur/upload-files"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('files[]', document.querySelector('input[name="files[]"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/projects/{id}/upload-files

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the project. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

files   file[]     

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 10240 Килобайт(а).

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/project-statuses" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"color\": \"mqeopf\",
    \"is_visible\": false
}"

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/project-statuses"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "color": "mqeopf",
    "is_visible": false
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exchange_rate\": 73,
    \"start_date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:23\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-06-06\"
}"

Request      

POST api/currency-history/{currencyId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

currencyId   string     

Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

exchange_rate   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0.00001. Example: 73

start_date   string     

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

end_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Поле value должно быть датой после start_date. Example: 2107-06-06

Обновить запись в истории курсов валюты

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/currency-history/consequatur/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exchange_rate\": 73,
    \"start_date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:23\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-06-06\"
}"

);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {

    "start_date": "2026-05-07T20:38:23",
    "end_date": "2107-06-06"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

currencyId   string     

Example: consequatur

historyId   string     

Example: consequatur

requires authentication

Example request:

    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/settings/currencies" \

);

requires authentication

curl --request GET \

    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouses"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "meta": {
            "current_page": 1,
            "next_page": null,
            "last_page": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "total": 0
        }
    }
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Request      

GET api/warehouses

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать склад

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouses" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouses"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "message": "Склад создан"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "name": [
            "The name field is required."
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Accept        

Example: application/json

name   string     

Example: consequatur

requires authentication

}

Example response (404):

}
