Создать инвентаризацию

requires authentication

Создаёт новую инвентаризацию для выбранного склада.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/inventories" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"category_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/inventories"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "category_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

curl --request PATCH \

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"id\": 17,
            \"actual_quantity\": 11613.31890586
        }
    ]
}"

);

};

            "actual_quantity": 11613.31890586

Request      

PATCH api/inventories/{id}/items

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the inventory. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

items   object[]     

Количество элементов в поле value должно быть не менее 1.
id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the inventory_items table. Example: 17

actual_quantity   number  optional    

Example: 11613.31890586

Request      

GET api/warehouse_receipts/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the warehouse receipt. Example: consequatur

Создать оприходование

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_receipts" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:23\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"price\": 56
        }
    ],
    \"client_balance_id\": 17,
    \"is_legacy\": false,
    \"is_simple\": true,
    \"status\": \"customs_clearance\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_receipts"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "cash_id": 17,
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:23",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "products": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "price": 56
        }
    ],
    "client_balance_id": 17,
    "is_legacy": false,
    "is_simple": true,
    "status": "customs_clearance"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/warehouse_receipts

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer     

Example: 17

cash_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

products   object[]     
product_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

price   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

is_legacy   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_simple   boolean  optional    

Example: true

status   string  optional    

Example: customs_clearance

Must be one of:
  • in_transit
  • customs_clearance
  • purchasing
  • fully_received

Изменить оприходование

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_receipts/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:23\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"status\": \"customs_clearance\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_receipts/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:23",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "status": "customs_clearance"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Оприходование обновлено"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Оприходование не найдено"
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "status": [
            "The selected status is invalid."
        ]
    }
}

Request      

POST api/warehouse_writeoffs

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

warehouse_id   integer     

Example: 17

reason   string     

Example: shortage

Must be one of:
  • defect
  • shortage
  • consumable
  • return_supplier
  • other
source_receipt_id   integer  optional    

This field is required when reason is return_supplier. The id of an existing record in the wh_receipts table. Example: 17

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

products   object[]     
product_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

source_receipt_product_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the wh_receipt_products table. Example: 17

    --header "Accept: application/json" \

    \"reason\": \"shortage\",
    \"source_receipt_id\": 17,

requires authentication

);

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/warehouse_movements

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать перемещение

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_movements" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"warehouse_from_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_to_id\": 17,
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:23\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/warehouse_movements"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "warehouse_from_id": 17,
    "warehouse_to_id": 17,
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:23",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "products": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Перемещение создано"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "warehouse_from_id": [
            "The warehouse from id field is required."
        ]
    }
}

Headers

Authorization

Example: application/json

Example: 17

warehouse_to_id   integer     

Example: 17

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:23

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

products   object[]     
product_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

requires authentication

Request      

GET api/cash_registers

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Получить баланс касс

requires authentication

Если параметр cash_register_ids не передан, вернётся баланс всех доступных касс. Если передан один ID, вернётся баланс одной кассы. Если передано несколько ID через запятую, вернётся баланс указанных касс.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers/balance" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers/balance"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/cash_registers/balance

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать кассу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"balance\": 11613.31890586,
    \"is_cash\": true,
    \"is_working_minus\": true,
    \"icon\": \"fuudtdsufvyvddqamniih\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "balance": 11613.31890586,
    "is_cash": true,
    "is_working_minus": true,
    "icon": "fuudtdsufvyvddqamniih"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/cash_registers

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

balance   number     

Example: 11613.31890586

currency_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table.

users   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

is_cash   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_working_minus   boolean  optional    

Example: true

icon   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 100. Example: fuudtdsufvyvddqamniih

Must be one of:
  • fa-solid fa-building-columns
  • fa-solid fa-ticket
  • fa-solid fa-location-dot
  • fa-solid fa-fire
  • fa-solid fa-thumbs-up
  • fa-solid fa-dollar-sign
  • fa-solid fa-cash-register
  • fa-solid fa-credit-card
  • fa-solid fa-briefcase
  • fa-solid fa-user
  • fa-solid fa-star

Обновить кассу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"is_cash\": false,
    \"is_working_minus\": true,
    \"icon\": \"eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/cash_registers/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "is_cash": false,
    "is_working_minus": true,
    "icon": "eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Example: consequatur

users   string[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

is_cash   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_working_minus   boolean  optional    

Example: true

icon   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 100. Example: eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn

Must be one of:
  • fa-solid fa-building-columns
  • fa-solid fa-ticket
  • fa-solid fa-location-dot
  • fa-solid fa-fire
  • fa-solid fa-thumbs-up
  • fa-solid fa-dollar-sign
  • fa-solid fa-cash-register
  • fa-solid fa-credit-card

Request      

GET api/transactions

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать транзакцию

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": 0,
    \"orig_amount\": 11613.31890586,
    \"currency_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"category_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"client_balance_id\": 17,
    \"order_id\": 17,
    \"source_type\": \"consequatur\",
    \"source_id\": 17,
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"is_debt\": false,
    \"is_adjustment\": true,
    \"exchange_rate\": 16
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": 0,
    "orig_amount": 11613.31890586,
    "currency_id": "consequatur",
    "cash_id": 17,
    "category_id": "consequatur",
    "client_balance_id": 17,
    "order_id": 17,
    "source_type": "consequatur",
    "source_id": 17,
    "note": "consequatur",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "is_debt": false,
    "is_adjustment": true,
    "exchange_rate": 16
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Транзакция создана"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "category_id": [
            "The category id field is required."
        ]
    }
}

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

POST api/transactions

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   integer     

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 1
  • 0
orig_amount   number     

Example: 11613.31890586

currency_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the currencies table. Example: consequatur

cash_id   integer     

Example: 17

category_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the transaction_categories table. Example: consequatur

project_id   string  optional    
client_id   string  optional    
client_balance_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the client_balances table. Example: 17

order_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the orders table. Example: 17

source_type   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

source_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

is_debt   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_adjustment   boolean  optional    

Example: true

exchange_rate   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0.00001. Example: 16

Изменить транзакцию

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"category_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"orig_amount\": 11613.31890586,
    \"is_debt\": true,
    \"source_type\": \"consequatur\",
    \"source_id\": 17,
    \"exchange_rate\": 45
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "category_id": "consequatur",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "orig_amount": 11613.31890586,
    "is_debt": true,
    "source_type": "consequatur",
    "source_id": 17,
    "exchange_rate": 45
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Транзакция обновлена"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Not found"
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "category_id": [
            "The category id field is required."
        ]
    }
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/transactions/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the transaction. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

category_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the transaction_categories table. Example: consequatur

project_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the projects table.

client_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the clients table.

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

orig_amount   number  optional    

Example: 11613.31890586

currency_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table.

is_debt   boolean  optional    

Example: true

source_type   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

source_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

exchange_rate   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0.00001. Example: 45

Удалить транзакцию

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transactions/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Транзакция удалена"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Not found"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/transfers

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать перемещение между кассами

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transfers" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"cash_id_from\": 17,
    \"cash_id_to\": 17,
    \"amount\": 45,
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"exchange_rate\": 45
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transfers"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "cash_id_from": 17,
    "cash_id_to": 17,
    "amount": 45,
    "note": "consequatur",
    "exchange_rate": 45
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

cash_id_from   integer     

Example: 17

cash_id_to   integer     

The value and cash_id_from must be different. Example: 17

amount   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 45

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

exchange_rate   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0.00001. Example: 45

GET api/sales

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать продажу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/sales" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"project_id\": 17,
    \"type\": \"balance\",
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"currency_id\": 17,
    \"discount\": 45,
    \"discount_type\": \"fixed\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"price\": 56
        }
    ],
    \"client_balance_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/sales"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "project_id": 17,
    "type": "balance",
    "cash_id": 17,
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "currency_id": 17,
    "discount": 45,
    "discount_type": "fixed",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "products": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "price": 56
        }
    ],
    "client_balance_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/sales

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

project_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

type   string     

Example: balance

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • balance
cash_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer     

Example: 17

currency_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the currencies table. Example: 17

discount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

discount_type   string  optional    

This field is required when discount is present. Example: fixed

Must be one of:
  • fixed
  • percent
date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

products   object[]     
product_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the products table. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 1. Example: 45

price   number     

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 56

client_balance_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

Обновить продажу

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/sales/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"project_id\": 17,
    \"type\": \"balance\",
    \"cash_id\": 17,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"currency_id\": 17,
    \"discount\": 45,
    \"discount_type\": \"fixed\",
    \"date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"price\": 56
        }
    ],
    \"client_balance_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/sales/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "project_id": 17,
    "type": "balance",
    "cash_id": 17,
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "currency_id": 17,
    "discount": 45,
    "discount_type": "fixed",
    "date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "products": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "price": 56
        }
    ],
    "client_balance_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/transaction_categories

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Создать категорию транзакций

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transaction_categories" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"type\": false,
    \"parent_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transaction_categories"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "type": false,
    "parent_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Категория транзакции создана"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "name": [
            "The name field is required."
        ]
    }
}

Request      

POST api/transaction_categories

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: consequatur

type   boolean     

Example: false

parent_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the transaction_categories table. Example: 17

Изменить категорию транзакций

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transaction_categories/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"type\": false,
    \"parent_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/transaction_categories/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "consequatur",
    "type": false,
    "parent_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "data": null,
    "message": "Категория транзакции обновлена"
}

Example response (401):


{
    "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

Example response (404):


{
    "error": "Not found"
}

Example response (422):


{
    "error": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": {
        "name": [
            "The name field is required."
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/invoices

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

invoice_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

order_ids   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the orders table.

Обновить счет

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/invoices/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": 17,
    \"invoice_date\": \"2026-05-07T20:38:24\",
    \"note\": \"consequatur\",
    \"status\": \"cancelled\",
    \"order_ids\": [
        17
    ],
    \"total_amount\": 45,
    \"products\": [
        {
            \"product_name\": \"qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam\",
            \"quantity\": 46,
            \"price\": 28,
            \"total_price\": 30,
            \"order_id\": 17,
            \"product_id\": 17
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/invoices/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": 17,
    "invoice_date": "2026-05-07T20:38:24",
    "note": "consequatur",
    "status": "cancelled",
    "order_ids": [
        17
    ],
    "total_amount": 45,
    "products": [
        {
            "product_name": "qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam",
            "quantity": 46,
            "price": 28,
            "total_price": 30,
            "order_id": 17,
            "product_id": 17
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

PUT api/invoices/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the invoice. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

client_id   integer     

Example: 17

invoice_date   string  optional    

Поле value не является датой. Example: 2026-05-07T20:38:24

note   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

status   string  optional    

Example: cancelled

Must be one of:
  • new
  • in_progress
  • paid
  • cancelled
order_ids   integer[]  optional    

The id of an existing record in the orders table.

products   object[]  optional    
product_name   string  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

quantity   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0.01. Example: 46

price   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 28

total_price   number  optional    

This field is required when products is present. Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 30

order_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the orders table. Example: 17

product_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

total_amount   number  optional    

Поле value должно быть не менее 0. Example: 45

Удалить счет

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/invoices/consequatur" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/invoices/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/chats/{chat_id}/typing

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

chat_id   integer     

The ID of the chat. Example: 1

Отправить сообщение

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "body=vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"\
    --form "parent_id=17"\
    --form "files[]=@D:\OSPanel\userdata\temp\php49CE.tmp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('body', 'vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq');
body.append('parent_id', '17');
body.append('files[]', document.querySelector('input[name="files[]"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/chats/{chat_id}/messages

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

chat_id   integer     

The ID of the chat. Example: 1

Body Parameters

body   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 10000. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

files   file[]  optional    

Must be a file. Размер файла в поле value не может превышать 51200 Килобайт(а).

parent_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the chat_messages table. Example: 17

Обновить сообщение

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"body\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"files\": [
        {
            \"path\": \"consequatur\",
            \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"mime_type\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "body": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "files": [
        {
            "path": "consequatur",
            "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "mime_type": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/chats/{chat_id}/messages/{message_id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

chat_id   integer     

The ID of the chat. Example: 1

message_id   integer     

The ID of the message. Example: 17

Body Parameters

body   string     

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 10000. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

files   object[]  optional    

Количество элементов в поле value не может превышать 10.
path   string     

Example: consequatur

name   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 255. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

mime_type   string  optional    

Количество символов в поле value не может превышать 100. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

Удалить сообщение

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

DELETE api/chats/{chat_id}/messages/{message_id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

chat_id   integer     

The ID of the chat. Example: 1

message_id   integer     

The ID of the message. Example: 17

Переслать сообщение

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17/forward" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"target_chat_id\": 17,
    \"hide_sender_name\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://hasapchy.local/api/chats/1/messages/17/forward"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "target_chat_id": 17,
    "hide_sender_name": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/chats/{chat_id}/messages/{message_id}/forward

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

chat_id   integer     

The ID of the chat. Example: 1

message_id   integer     

The ID of the message. Example: 17

Body Parameters

target_chat_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the chats table. Example: 17

hide_sender_name   boolean  optional    

Example: false
